title: Item repair
description: Repair Items durability in you inventory.
body:
⚠️ Development Status: Maintenance Mode 

Feature development for this mod has concluded with version 1.21.1(Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge). 

As I focus on other projects (like DynamicEnchants), I will not be porting this mod to future versions of Minecraft. 

However, I am still maintaining all current and previous versions. If you encounter any bugs or issues in any released version of this mod, please report them, and I will release fixes as needed!

🛠️ Item Repair 

Keep your gear in top shape with passive repair trinkets. 

📖 About the Mod 

Inspired by the classic "Repair Talisman" from Project E, this mod adds three new items that passively repair the tools and armor in your inventory or equipped slots.

💎 The Items 
* Ring of Repair: Provides a standard repair rate. 
* Repair Talisman: Provides a standard repair rate. 
* Repair Necklace: Crafted by combining the Ring and Talisman. This offers a significantly increased repair rate. 

⚙️ Features & Config 

This mod is highly configurable to suit your playstyle.

*   Inventory Repair: Don't have a trinket slot? No problem. You can enable a setting to allow these items to repair gear just by sitting in your inventory.
*   Area Repair: You can enable a feature that allows the necklace to repair items inside nearby chests. The radius (distance) is fully configurable.
*   Config Reload: Includes a command to reload the config in-game, so you can tweak settings without restarting.

📥 Requirements & Dependencies Please ensure you have the correct dependencies for your Mod Loader: NeoForge: Requires a "Curios-like" mod to function properly in trinket slots. Confirmed working with:

*   Accessories (requires Curios Compat Layer)
*   Curios Continuation
*   Adorned Fabric:
*   Requires Trinkets.
*   Note: Older versions (0.0.5 & 0.0.6) required owo-lib. Version 0.0.7+ does not. Forge:
*   Requires Ohmega.

🤝 Community & Support Modpacks: ✅ YES! You can use this mod in your modpack. Feedback: Found a bug?

*   💬 Discord: Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Rcwdr7e) and leave a message in the mod's text channel.
